mapper.select: select p.*, d2.dname as dname2, d1.dname as dname3 from professor p inner join department d1 on p.deptno = d1.deptno inner join department d2 on d1.part = d2.deptno

select s.*, d2.dname as dname2, d1.dname as dname3, d3.dname as subName3, p.name as prof_name from stu s left join department d3 on s.deptno2 = d3.deptno left join professor p on s.profno = p.profno inner join department d1 on s.deptno1 = d1.deptno inner join department d2 on d1.part = d2.deptno where 1=1
and s.grade = #{grade}
